title: Create Dirt 'n Steel
description: 2 New dimensions. Over 75 new items. Works without create but some things need it.
body:
Adds dirt dimension and in that dimension you can get ores like Super Dirt and Ruby.
Adds Power Cores and those can make strong gear.
Adds Steel obvosily and stainless steel. 
Adds American Armor, a American Sword, and a American Pickaxe.
Adds Azurite as an ore that can spaw in the overworld as well as the dirt dimension. 
Sorry for any spelling mistakes in the mod.
